title: Custom DE Upgrade Recipes
description: Custom recipes for Draconic Evolution armor/tool upgrades.
body:
This mod allows you to configure the recipes for armor and tool upgrades in Draconic Evolution. While Draconic Evolution has a custom fusion recipes config, that config lacks the ability to modify recipes for Upgrades. Default configuration makes no changes to the recipes.

The majority of the code in this mod was written by FoxMcloud5655 to solve an Issue I had. The changes I have made allow any user to modify the recipes with no coding knowledge.
